summary: P1 mDNS Discovery + Secure Pairing testing complete. All 36 tests passed (20 unit tests + 16 API tests). Frontend pages /admin/discovery and /kiosk/BOARD-1 render correctly with German localization. Pairing code displays in kiosk footer. WebSocket still works with 'Live' indicator on dashboard.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with admin/admin123 returns access_token + user
GET /api/agent/pair/code - code is stable within 60s rotation window
POST /api/agent/pair/verify accepts correct code and returns 64-char nonce
GET /api/system/info returns version, mode: MASTER, uptime, disk info
/kiosk/BOARD-1 shows pairing code in footer (6 digits)
Unit tests: pairing code is 6 digits
Unit tests: code stable within window
Unit tests: code rotates after expiry
Unit tests: correct code passes verification
Unit tests: wrong code fails verification
Unit tests: challenge creation returns 64-char nonce
Unit tests: valid challenge response passes
critical_code_review_comments: mDNS service properly initializes in MASTER mode for discovery
Pairing service implements secure challenge-response with replay prevention
Discovery router correctly requires admin auth for /discovery/* endpoints
/api/agent/pair/code correctly has no auth requirement (for kiosk display)
TrustedPeer model properly added to models/__init__.py
Frontend Discovery.js uses correct data-testids for testing
LockedScreen.js fetches pairing code every 5 seconds and displays countdown

success_rate.frontend: 100% (discovery page + kiosk pairing code + dashboard live indicator)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - using existing admin/staff users and BOARD-1/BOARD-2
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Discovery + Pairing fully tested. Key endpoints: /api/agent/pair/code (no auth), /api/agent/pair/verify, /api/agent/pair/complete, /api/discovery/agents (admin auth), /api/discovery/peers (admin auth). mDNS discovery runs in MASTER mode - no real agents on LAN so agents list is empty. Pairing code rotation is 60 seconds. All German localization working: 'Erkannte Agents', 'Vertrauensbeziehungen', 'Aktiv', 'Aktualisieren', 'GESPERRT', 'Pairing-Code'.
